commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a legacy-root-only raw stale session transcript candidate path and regression tests for legacy-root inclusion and outside-root exclusion.

PR surface: Source +32, Tests +43. Total +75 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows current main can drop raw legacy-root stale transcript paths when resolveSessionFilePath falls back to a synthesized current-session path; I did not run tests because this review is read-only.
